content:
It isn't complex, actually, it is an one-liner. I really like it though. It could be useful for you.
const ttm = <K extends string | number>(val: K, map: Record<K, string>) => map[val]
I use it like this in my Astro and Svelte 5 projects:
ttm(variant, { filled: "bg-inverse not-disabled:hover:bg-inverse/40 not-disabled:active:bg-accent", outlined: "pseudo-border bg-obverse not-disabled:hover:bg-inverse not-disabled:active:bg-accent", text: "bg-obverse not-disabled:hover:bg-inverse not-disabled:active:bg-accent", }) Nothing else. Just that. :)

  submitted by   /u/NoctisShadowzel
[link]   [comments]
